Data Retention Policy
====================

Effective Date: January 1, 2024

1. Purpose
This Data Retention Policy outlines the periods for which we retain personal data.

2. Retention Periods
  (a) Account data: Retained for the duration of the account plus 3 years
  (b) Transaction data: Retained for 7 years as required by law
  (c) Log data: Retained for 12 months

3. Data Deletion
Upon expiry of the retention period, data is securely deleted.

4. Compliance
This policy complies with the IT Act 2000 and SPDI Rules 2011.
